title: AuditRecord
description: One JSONL line written to runs/<session-id>/audit.jsonl per intercepted tool response. Enforces FR-005 (100% raw retention) and SC-004 (byte-for-byte recoverability). Written BEFORE normalization so a crash mid-normalize cannot lose the raw payload.

tool_use_id.description: 1:1 with a RawToolResponse. Uniquely identifies the intercepted response within the session.

tool_name.description: Name of the legacy tool that produced the raw payload.

received_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the hook observed the payload.

raw_bytes_b64.description: Base64 of the exact bytes returned by the legacy source. Losslessly decodes back to the original for SC-004.

raw_sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the decoded raw bytes. Verified during test roundtrip (test_audit_roundtrip.py).

raw_token_count.description: Token count of the raw payload under the measurement counter documented in research.md D-006. Feeds SC-001 (>=70% reduction) without a second measurement pass.

normalized_token_count.description: Token count of the NormalizedPayload under the same measurement counter. Paired with raw_token_count to compute the reduction ratio.
